case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MELINDA CHRISTINE HEATH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED APR-17-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEATH, MELINDA CHRISTINE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JOSEFINA FLORES. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $542.45 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HEATH, MELINDA CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEATH, MELINDA CHRISTINE $388.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $473.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
